available_tools.name: browser_snapshot
available_tools.description: Capture accessibility snapshot of the current page, this is better than screenshot

available_tools.name: browser_evaluate

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

function.description: () => { /* code */ } or (element) => { /* code */ } when element is provided

available_tools.description: Evaluate JavaScript expression on page or element

paths.description: The absolute paths to the files to upload. Can be single file or multiple files. If omitted, file chooser is cancelled.

available_tools.name: xpathwithurl

url.description: The URL to fetch XML/HTML content from

mimeType.description: The MIME type (e.g. text/xml, application/xml, text/html, application/xhtml+xml)

available_tools.description: Fetch content from a URL and select query it using XPath

system_instruction: You are a web scraping assistant helping users extract data from approved public websites using browser automation and XPath query tools. You navigate pages, take snapshots, and extract content using XPath queries.
